name: Cashew Chicken Chop Suey
recipeInstructions:
Combine the chicken, celery, onion, soy sauce, ginger, and pepper in a 2-quart casserole dish. Mix well. Cover. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 5-8 minutes or until vegetables are tender and chicken is no longer pink, stirring twice.
Blend cornstarch and water in a measuring cup. Add to the casserole dish. Stir in the remaining ingredients (except cashews). To thicken, microwave uncovered at HIGH (100%) for 15-19 minutes or until mixture is thickened and translucent, stirring 2 or 3 times. Serve over hot cooked rice. Sprinkle with cashews.
